response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and cross-platform experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT architecture, UML modeling, and team management at an executive level, and has only basic German proficiency — a hard requirement for the role.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions with GISCollective and multiple DLang libraries
Extensive full-stack experience across languages, platforms, and architectures
Proven track record in mentoring, workshops, and technical knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML expertise, IT architecture design leadership, or project management at senior level
Lacks documented experience managing interdisciplinary teams or advising clients on compliance/security
